parameters.query: INSERT INTO ingested_content (source_name, source_url, content_hash, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language, status) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) ON CONFLICT (content_hash) DO NOTHING

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { message: 'Ingestion run complete', rows_inserted: items.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
